raw_response:
I agree with the conclusion provided by @Agent1. The evidence supports an average daily intake ranging from 100 to 150 mg, which aligns perfectly with option D. Additionally, considering safe upper limits typically being well above these amounts reinforces the validity of recommending doses up to around 150 mg per day as generally acceptable without risk of toxicity.
